slash:server-status.summary: Posts a live server status embed that auto-refreshes every 30 seconds.

compactEmbed.description: Live Discord server overview. Refreshes every **30 seconds**.

embed.description: Live Discord server overview. Refreshes every **30 seconds**.

effects: Running again removes the previous status message in that channel

prefix:status.summary: Same live status embed as /server-status — triggered with the . prefix.

embed.description: Live Discord server overview. Refreshes every **30 seconds**.

prefix:purge.summary: Bulk-deletes messages in the current channel. Pinned messages are always skipped.

steps.text: The result message auto-deletes after 5 seconds.

effects: Messages older than 14 days are deleted one-by-one

slash:server-roles.summary: Sends a paginated embed listing every server role (20 per page).

embed.title: 🛡️・Server Roles
embed.description:
**1.** @Owner • `Owner` • pos 25 • 1 members
**2.** @Admin • `Admin` • pos 24 • 4 members
**3.** @Staff • `Staff` • pos 20 • 18 members

footer.text: Use /server-roles page:2 for the next page.

effects: Reply is ephemeral (only you see it) for slash

prefix:roles.summary: Prefix version of /server-roles — same paginated role list embed.

embed.title: 🛡️・Server Roles
embed.description:
**1.** @Owner • pos 25 • 1 members
**2.** @Admin • pos 24 • 4 members

slash:counting.summary: Staff tool to set up, check, reset, or disable the counting channel.

embed.title: 🔢 Premium Counting
embed.description:
**Channel:** #counting
**Status:** Enabled
**Next:** `42`
**Current:** `41`
**Record:** `128`
**Mistakes:** `3`

steps.text:
**setup** — pick channel + start number
**reset** — restart the count
**disable** — turn counting off

effects: Members count in the channel by sending the next number
Wrong number or double-count resets to 1

prefix:counting.summary: Prefix version of /counting — setup, status, reset, disable. When enabled, members count in the channel.

embed.title: 🔢 Counting Started
embed.description:
**Channel:** #counting
**Next:** `1`
**Rule:** No double-counting.

steps.text: In #counting, members send **41**, **42**… Veltrix reacts ✅. Wrong number → ❌ + reset to 1.

effects: Double-counting by the same user breaks the chain

slash:delete-lcrp-channels.summary: Deletes one selected channel after staff confirmation (legacy LCRP cleanup).

embed.title: Confirm Channel Delete
embed.description: Select the channel to delete. This cannot be undone.

slash:setup-lcrp-channels.summary: Creates or updates the City of Angels ERLC channel layout and permissions.

embed.title: Channel Layout Updated
embed.description: ERLC categories and channels synced for City of Angels.

slash:setup-lcrp-roles.summary: Creates or updates the City of Angels role structure.

embed.title: Roles Updated
embed.description: City of Angels role structure created or refreshed.

slash:ticket-panel.summary: Staff posts the support ticket panel in the channel. Members pick a category to open a private ticket.

embed.title: City of Angels Support
embed.description: Choose a category below to open a private support ticket.

effects: Creates a private ticket channel when a member selects a category
Staff can claim, close, and generate transcripts

session:session.summary: Session vote with Ready/Out buttons, then start or end the in-game session.
effects: .session end closes it and logs to staff channels

slash:setup.summary: Administrator setup toolkit — channels, roles, permissions, audit, and cleanup.

embed.title: Setup · Channels
embed.description:
City of Angels channel layout created or updated.

Categories like **INFORMATION**, **SESSIONS**, **COMMUNITY**, and **STAFF** are synced.

effects: Rebuilds the safe COA server layout

slash:setup-erlc-roles.summary: Creates or syncs the in-game ERLC role hierarchy on Discord.

embed.title: ERLC Roles Synced
embed.description: In-game role hierarchy created or updated on the server.

slash:fix-erlc-role-order.summary: Reapplies role position order without changing channels.

embed.title: Role Order Fixed
embed.description: Role hierarchy order reapplied successfully.

slash:fix-erlc-channel-permissions.summary: Reapplies ERLC category and channel permission overwrites across the server.

embed.title: ERLC Permission Sync
embed.description: Applying category permission overwrites first...

embed.title: ERLC Permission Sync Complete
embed.description: Categories and channels updated with the correct overwrites.

slash:shift.summary: Staff shift tracker — clock in/out, view status, leaderboard, and award points.

embed.title: 🟢 Shift Started
embed.description:
**Staff:** @You
**Status:** On duty
**Started:** just now

effects: Earns staff points based on time on shift
Logs to staff shift channel if configured

prefix:level.summary: Shows XP level, rank, progress bar, and level role for you or a mentioned member.
effects: XP is earned passively from messages (60s cooldown)

prefix:levels.summary: Shows the top 10 members on the XP leaderboard.

embed.title: XP Leaderboard
embed.description:
🥇 **Alex** — Level 22 · 41,200 XP
🥈 **Jordan** — Level 18 · 32,100 XP
🥉 **Preston** — Level 14 · 18,420 XP

prefix:addxp.summary: Staff manually grants XP to a member (no embed — plain confirmation).

steps.content: ✅ Added **500 XP** to @Member. Now **Level 12** with **8,200 XP**.

prefix:testwelcome.summary: Posts the welcome message to the channel — plain text with Verify + member count buttons.

steps.content: 👋 Welcome @You to **City of Angels**! You are our **1,284th member**, we hope you enjoy your stay!

steps.text: Includes **Verify** link button and disabled **👥 member count** button.

effects: Same message sent automatically when someone joins

prefix:setuproles.summary: Posts the reaction-role panel so members can self-assign roles.

embed.title: Reaction Roles
embed.description: React below to get your roles.

steps.text: Members react to assign/remove roles automatically.
